# Code of Conduct

This project follows the [Contributor Covenant Code of Conduct v2.1](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/2/1/code_of_conduct/).

Be respectful, constructive, and professional. Harassment, discrimination, and disruptive behavior are not tolerated.

Report violations through [GitHub private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/SysAdminDoc/SysAdminDoc/security/advisories/new) or by contacting the maintainer directly.
